← All charges

Fuchs Elephant Charge 2020

26 September 2020 · 📍 Kawanga River

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2020 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Birdwatch Zambia 263,000 Support Conservation Education officer costs to work with schools and communities in IBAs.
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 263,000 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lower Zambezi 263,000 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 263,000 Again, the funds were shifted to the Human Wildlife Conflict Mitigation Program. Funds also continue to support snare removals via anti-snaring patrols and since the Elephant Charge began supporting CSL, they have removed over 9000 deadly wire snares from the bush.
Game Rangers International 263,000 Towards community conservation education, including popular local radio programs
International Crane Foundation 263,000 Support of Communication and Education office, field trips to Kafue Flats, school program development
Kasanka Trust 263,000 Expand the Environment Education program, contribute to costs of EE Officer
Mark Terken Special Project 34,837 Went to Angwa Conservation - Funds are being held for constructon of planned animal rescue & rehabilitation centre
Musekese Conservation 263,000 Capital equipment for upgrading patrol staff centre, radio sets & repeater, tractor slasher, camera
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 500,000 Country wide clubs supported through Covid period with social media videos, continued weekly radio program and more
Zambian Carnivore Programme 263,000 Supporting Conservation Biologist Training, Conservation Clubs, de-snaring of carnivores
Total 3,001,837
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
elephantcharge.org
